message:
test(unit): expand patterns.rs (89→153) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 64 new tests covering: AgentType/Severity/Detection/TraceSpan/
TraceEvidence/TraceGate/TraceBounds/MatchTrace/RuleDef/PatternPack
serde round-trips, interpolate_template all placeholders,
get_preview_command/get_manual_fix with and without templates,
parse_severity_override valid+invalid, bound_utf8 edge cases including
multi-byte chars, slice_bytes valid/invalid/empty, DetectionContext
set_ttl and MAX_SEEN_KEYS eviction, cross-segment tail buffer matching,
builtin_pack_by_name all names, builtin_packs count, is_pack_file
valid/invalid extensions, load_pack_from_id builtin/file/unknown schemes,
normalize_pack_key exact/stripped/no-match, merge_pack_overrides
combining/dedup/severity-wins, apply_pack_overrides empty noop,
quick_reject disabled, detect/context/trace empty text,
dedup_key non-object, engine packs/rules accessors,
trace_gates_skeleton, engine_index_debug, Claude Code tool_use/overloaded
and Gemini OAuth detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
